race.description: Bill Mcgoven & Mick Bugler Maiden Hcp
race.comment: ARCELIA (4) resumes and has switched from a strong Victorian stable. Raced well enough three back on debut and has prepared for this with a big trial win at Toowoomba. Draws inside, and a bold run is likely. AKKU (10) resumed at Toowoomba with a solid effort when she jumped as the favourite. May need a bit longer now, but she should be right in the finish with the extra fitness. SHAMOUTI (9) resumes for a new yard and would be very competitive if she found her early form. Draws awkwardly but is worth a betting watch. USUAL LIMITS (5) resumes for a new stable and has trialled at Doomben. Maps well and Lang rides. Has plenty of scope for improvement.
